---
title: "Data Analysis App"
output: flexdashboard::flex_dashboard
runtime: shiny
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(shiny)
library(flexdashboard)
library(DT)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(readxl)
library(jsonlite)
library(corrplot)
library(e1071)

## Reactive Values ==> dataset that can be used globally

rv <- reactiveValues(
  # Navigation
  page = 1,
  # page 1 = Opening
  # page 2 = Load Data
  # page 3 = Data Health Report
  # page 4 = Data Cleaning Wizard
  # page 5 = Feature Engineering
  # page 6 = EDA
  # page 7 = Thank You

  # Data
  raw_data         = NULL,
  cleaned_data     = NULL,
  engineered_data  = NULL,

  # Scanning
  col_report       = NULL,
  col_issues       = list(),
  wizard_cols      = NULL,

  # Cleaning wizard state
  current_col_idx   = 1,
  current_issue_idx = 1,
  columns_done      = FALSE,

  # Feature engineering
  new_col_names    = c(),

  # EDA
  analysis_done    = FALSE
)
```




```{css, echo=FALSE}
/* ============================================================
   GLOBAL STYLES
   ============================================================ */
/* Remove flexdashboard default padding/grey background */
.chart-wrapper, .chart-stage {
  background: #ffffff !important;
  border: none !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
}

body {
  background-color: #f5f7fa;
  font-family: 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
}

/* ============================================================
   WIZARD CARD - the white centered box on every page
   ============================================================ */
.wizard-card {
  background: #ffffff;
  border-radius: 12px;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
  padding: 50px 60px;
  max-width: 700px;
  margin: 60px auto;
}

/* Wide card for pages with tables */
.wizard-card-wide {
  background: #ffffff;
  border-radius: 12px;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
  padding: 50px 60px;
  max-width: 1000px;
  margin: 60px auto;
}

/* ============================================================
   TYPOGRAPHY
   ============================================================ */
.wizard-card h2, .wizard-card-wide h2 {
  font-size: 28px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #1a1a2e;
  margin-bottom: 6px;
}

.wizard-card p, .wizard-card-wide p {
  color: #555;
  font-size: 15px;
  line-height: 1.6;
}

.wizard-card hr, .wizard-card-wide hr {
  border-color: #eee;
  margin: 20px 0;
}

/* ============================================================
   CENTERED BUTTON
   ============================================================ */
.btn-center {
  display: block;
  margin: 30px auto 0 auto;
  text-align: center;
}

.btn-center .btn {
  padding: 12px 40px;
  font-size: 16px;
  border-radius: 8px;
}

/* ============================================================
   PRIMARY BUTTON STYLE
   ============================================================ */
.btn-primary {
  background-color: #4361ee !important;
  border-color: #4361ee !important;
  border-radius: 8px !important;
}

.btn-primary:hover {
  background-color: #3451d1 !important;
  border-color: #3451d1 !important;
}

.btn-warning {
  border-radius: 8px !important;
}

.btn-success {
  border-radius: 8px !important;
}

.btn-danger {
  border-radius: 8px !important;
}

/* ============================================================
   STEP LIST ON OPENING PAGE
   ============================================================ */
.step-list {
  list-style: none;
  padding: 0;
  margin: 16px 0;
}

.step-list li {
  padding: 10px 0 10px 40px;
  position: relative;
  color: #444;
  font-size: 15px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #f0f0f0;
}

.step-list li:last-child {
  border-bottom: none;
}

.step-list li::before {
  content: attr(data-step);
  position: absolute;
  left: 0;
  top: 10px;
  background: #4361ee;
  color: white;
  width: 24px;
  height: 24px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: bold;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  text-align: center;
  line-height: 24px;
}

/* ============================================================
   PROGRESS INDICATOR
   ============================================================ */
.wizard-progress {
  background: #f0f4ff;
  border-left: 4px solid #4361ee;
  padding: 12px 16px;
  border-radius: 6px;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
  font-size: 14px;
  color: #333;
}

/* ============================================================
   VALUE BOXES - override flexdashboard defaults
   ============================================================ */
.value-box {
  border-radius: 10px !important;
}
```



```{r}
# All pages rendered inside one uiOutput (makes it more interactive)
# Controlled by rv$page

uiOutput("wizard_page")

output$wizard_page <- renderUI({
  switch(as.character(rv$page),
         
  ##page 1 = Welcome Page
    "1" = tags$div(class = "wizard-card",
      tags$div(style = "text-align: center; margin-bottom: 24px;",
        tags$h2("Data Analysis App", style = "font-size:32px; font-weight:700; color:#1a1a2e;"),
        tags$p("Upload, clean, engineer, and explore your dataset interactively.",
               style = "color:#777; font-size:16px;")
      ),
      hr(),
      h4("What you will do:", style = "color:#333; margin-bottom:12px;"),
      tags$ul(class = "step-list",
        tags$li("data-step" = "1", "Upload your dataset or use a built-in one"),
        tags$li("data-step" = "2", "Review a data health report"),
        tags$li("data-step" = "3", "Clean your data column by column"),
        tags$li("data-step" = "4", "Engineer new features"),
        tags$li("data-step" = "5", "Explore your data with interactive visualizations")
      ),
      hr(),
      tags$p("Supported formats: .csv  .xlsx  .json  .rds",
             style = "text-align:center; color:#aaa; font-size:13px;"),
      tags$div(class = "btn-center",
        actionButton("btn_p1_next", "Get Started", class = "btn-primary btn-lg")
      )
    ),
  
  ## Page 2 = Loading data page
  
    "2" = tags$div(class = "wizard-card",
      h2("Load Data"),
      hr(),
      radioButtons("data_source", "Choose data source:",
        choices = c("Upload my own file" = "upload", "Use built-in dataset" = "builtin")
      ),
      conditionalPanel(
        condition = "input.data_source == 'upload'",
        fileInput("file_upload", "Upload File:", accept = c(".csv",".xlsx",".json",".rds"))
      ),
      conditionalPanel(
        condition = "input.data_source == 'builtin'",
        selectInput("builtin_dataset", "Select dataset:", choices = c("mtcars","iris"))
      ),
      br(),
      actionButton("btn_load_data", "Load Data", class = "btn-primary"),
      br(), br(),
      uiOutput("load_preview_ui"),
      br(),
      uiOutput("btn_p2_next_ui")
    ),
  ## Page 3 = Data Health Report

    "3" = tags$div(class = "wizard-card-wide",
      h2("Data Health Report"),
      hr(),
      h4("Dataset Overview"),
      uiOutput("health_summary_cards"),
      br(),
      h4("Column-by-Column Health Table"),
      DTOutput("health_table"),
      br(),
      fluidRow(
        column(6, actionButton("btn_p3_back", "Back", class = "btn-default")),
        column(6, actionButton("btn_p3_next", "Analyze, Fix & Check Columns", class = "btn-warning btn-lg"))
      )
    ),
  ## Page 4 = cleaning data & reviewing column-by-column (TODO)

    "4" = tags$div(class = "wizard-card",
      h2("Data Cleaning"),
      hr(),
      tags$div(class = "wizard-progress",
        uiOutput("wizard_progress_ui")
      ),
      hr(),
      uiOutput("wizard_issue_ui"),
      br(),
      fluidRow(
        column(4, actionButton("btn_next_issue", "Next", class = "btn-primary"))
      ),
      br(),
      uiOutput("duplicates_panel_ui"),
      uiOutput("btn_p4_next_ui")
    ),
  ## Page 5 = feature engineering (TODO)
  "5" = tags$div(class = "wizard-card-wide",

  h2("Feature Engineering"),
  hr(),

  h3("Numeric Feature Engineering"),

  selectInput(
    "fe_column",
    "Select numeric column:",
    choices = NULL
  ),

  selectInput(
    "fe_method",
    "Choose method:",
    choices = c(
      "Binning",
      "Normalize",
      "Standardize",
      "Arithmetic Formula"
    )
  ),

  conditionalPanel(
    condition = "input.fe_method == 'Binning'",
    numericInput("bin_n", "Number of bins:", value = 5, min = 2)
  ),

  conditionalPanel(
    condition = "input.fe_method == 'Arithmetic Formula'",
    textInput(
      "formula_expr",
      "Enter formula (example: col1 + col2)"
    )
  ),

  textInput(
    "new_feature_name",
    "New feature column name:"
  ),

  actionButton(
    "apply_feature",
    "Apply Numeric Feature",
    class = "btn-success"
  ),

  hr(),

  h3("Categorical Feature Engineering"),

  selectInput(
    "cat_column",
    "Select categorical column:",
    choices = NULL
  ),

  actionButton(
    "one_hot_encode",
    "Apply One-Hot Encoding",
    class = "btn-warning"
  ),

  hr(),

  h3("Date Feature Engineering"),

  selectInput(
    "date_column",
    "Select date column:",
    choices = NULL
  ),

  actionButton(
    "extract_date",
    "Extract Year / Month / Day",
    class = "btn-info"
  ),

  br(), br(),

  fluidRow(
    column(6, actionButton("btn_p5_back", "Back", class = "btn-default")),
    column(6, actionButton("btn_p5_next", "Next", class = "btn-primary"))
   )
  ),
 
  ## Page 6 = EDA (TODO)
  "6" = tags$div(class = "wizard-card-wide",

  h2("Exploratory Data Analysis"),
  hr(),

  h3("Dataset Summary (Each Column)"),

  tableOutput("dataset_summary"),

  hr(),
  
  h3('Distribution Summary'),
  
  selectInput('eda_summary_var','select variable:', choices = NULL),
  tableOutput('eda_distribution_summary'),
  
  hr(),
  

  h3("Correlation Matrix (Heatmap)"),

  plotOutput("correlation_heatmap"),
  
  hr(),
  
  h3('Interactive Visualization'),
  
  selectInput(
    'eda_plot_type',
    'Plot type:',
    choices = c('Histogram','Boxplot','Bar Chart')
  ),
  
  selectInput('eda_x_var','X variable:',choices = NULL),
  
  uiOutput('eda_y_var_ui'),
  
  plotOutput('eda_interactive_plot', height = '400px'),
  
  
  
  br(),

  fluidRow(
    column(6, actionButton("btn_p6_back", "Back", class = "btn-default")),
    column(6, actionButton("btn_p6_next", "Done with Analysis", class = "btn-danger"))
  )
),
    
  ## Page 7 = Thank you 

  "7" = tags$div(class = "wizard-card",
  style = "text-align: center;",
      br(),
      h2("Thank you!", style = "font-size:32px; color:#1a1a2e;"),
      p("Your data has been processed.", style = "color:#777; font-size:16px;"),
      br(),
      tags$div(class = "btn-center",
        actionButton("btn_restart", "Upload a Different Dataset", class = "btn-primary btn-lg")
      )
    )
  )
})
```

```{r}
# Page 1 -> 2
observeEvent(input$btn_p1_next, { rv$page <- 2 })
```

```{r}
# Page 2: Backend for Loading Data
# Note that col_report is generated throgh the function scan_dataset()!

observeEvent(input$btn_load_data, {
  if (input$data_source == "builtin") {
    rv$raw_data <- switch(input$builtin_dataset,
      "mtcars" = mtcars,
      "iris"   = iris
    )
  } else {
    req(input$file_upload)
    ext  <- tools::file_ext(input$file_upload$name)
    path <- input$file_upload$datapath
    rv$raw_data <- switch(ext,
      "csv"  = read_csv(path, show_col_types = FALSE),
      "xlsx" = readxl::read_excel(path),
      "json" = as.data.frame(jsonlite::fromJSON(path)),
      "rds"  = readRDS(path)
    )
  }
  rv$cleaned_data    <- rv$raw_data
  rv$engineered_data <- rv$raw_data
  rv$col_report      <- scan_dataset(rv$raw_data)
  rv$col_issues      <- build_issue_list(rv$col_report)
  rv$wizard_cols     <- names(rv$raw_data)
  showNotification("Data successfully loaded!", type = "message")
})

# Show data preview + Next button only after data is loaded

output$load_preview_ui <- renderUI({
  req(rv$raw_data)
  tagList(
    h4("Data Preview (First 10 rows)"),
    DTOutput("load_data_preview")
  )
})
output$load_data_preview <- renderDT({
  req(rv$raw_data)
  datatable(head(rv$raw_data, 10), options = list(scrollX = TRUE, dom = "t"), rownames = FALSE)
})
output$btn_p2_next_ui <- renderUI({
  req(rv$raw_data)
  fluidRow(
    column(6, actionButton("btn_p2_back", "Back", class = "btn-default")),
    column(6, actionButton("btn_p2_next", "View Data Health Report", class = "btn-primary"))
  )
})

##Where each button leads to: 
observeEvent(input$btn_p2_back, { rv$page <- 1 }) ## Going back to first Welcome Page
observeEvent(input$btn_p2_next, { rv$page <- 3 }) ## Going to "Data Health Report" Page
```


```{r}
## Producing Data Health Report (Showing the Overall Analysis of data)

output$health_summary_cards <- renderUI({
  req(rv$raw_data)
  n_rows   <- nrow(rv$raw_data)
  n_cols   <- ncol(rv$raw_data)
  n_dupes  <- sum(duplicated(rv$raw_data))
  n_issues <- if (is.null(rv$col_report)) 0 else sum(rv$col_report$has_issues)

  make_card <- function(value, label, color) {
    tags$div(
      style = paste0(
        "background:", color, "; border-radius:10px; padding:20px; text-align:center;",
        "color:white; margin:8px;"
      ),
      tags$div(style = "font-size:32px; font-weight:700;", value),
      tags$div(style = "font-size:13px; margin-top:4px; opacity:0.9;", label)
    )
  }

  fluidRow(
    column(3, make_card(n_rows,   "Total Rows",          "#4361ee")),
    column(3, make_card(n_cols,   "Total Columns",       "#4361ee")),
    column(3, make_card(n_dupes,  "Duplicate Rows",      "#f4a261")),
    column(3, make_card(n_issues, "Columns with Issues", "#e63946"))
  )
})

output$health_table <- renderDT({
  req(rv$col_report)
  display        <- rv$col_report[, c("column", "detected_type", "status")]
  names(display) <- c("Column", "Detected Type", "Status")
  datatable(display, options = list(scrollX = TRUE, dom = "t", pageLength = 50), rownames = FALSE)
})
```

## should look over
```{r}

# Page 3 -> 4
observeEvent(input$btn_p3_back, { rv$page <- 2 })
observeEvent(input$btn_p3_next, {
  rv$current_col_idx   <- 1
  rv$current_issue_idx <- 1
  rv$page <- 4
})

# Page 4 -> 5 (shown after columns_done)
output$btn_p4_next_ui <- renderUI({
  req(rv$columns_done)
  fluidRow(
    column(6, actionButton("btn_p4_back", "Back", class = "btn-default")),
    column(6, actionButton("btn_p4_next", "Next: Feature Engineering", class = "btn-primary"))
  )
})
observeEvent(input$btn_p4_back, { rv$page <- 3 })
observeEvent(input$btn_p4_next, { rv$page <- 5 })

# Page 5 -> 6
observeEvent(input$btn_p5_back, { rv$page <- 4 })
observeEvent(input$btn_p5_next, { rv$page <- 6 })
# Detect numeric columns for Feature Engineering
# Detect numeric columns for Feature Engineering
observeEvent(rv$page, {

  if(rv$page != 5) return()

  df <- rv$cleaned_data

  if(is.null(df)){
    df <- rv$raw_data
  }

  if(is.null(df)) return()

  numeric_cols <- names(df)[sapply(df, is.numeric)]

  categorical_cols <- names(df)[sapply(df, function(x)
    is.character(x) || is.factor(x)
  )]

  date_cols <- names(df)[sapply(df, inherits, "Date")]

  updateSelectInput(session, "fe_column", choices = numeric_cols)

  updateSelectInput(session, "cat_column", choices = categorical_cols)

  updateSelectInput(session, "date_column", choices = date_cols)

})
# Apply Feature Engineering
observeEvent(input$apply_feature, {

  df <- rv$cleaned_data
  if(is.null(df)){
    df <- rv$raw_data
  }

  req(df)
  req(input$fe_column)
  req(input$new_feature_name)

  col <- input$fe_column
  new_name <- input$new_feature_name
  method <- input$fe_method

  if(method == "Binning"){

    bins <- input$bin_n

    df[[new_name]] <- cut(
      df[[col]],
      breaks = bins,
      labels = FALSE
    )

  } else if(method == "Normalize"){

    x <- df[[col]]

    df[[new_name]] <- (x - min(x, na.rm=TRUE)) /
                      (max(x, na.rm=TRUE) - min(x, na.rm=TRUE))

  } else if(method == "Standardize"){

    x <- df[[col]]

    df[[new_name]] <- (x - mean(x, na.rm=TRUE)) /
                      sd(x, na.rm=TRUE)

  } else if(method == "Arithmetic Formula"){

    expr <- parse(text = input$formula_expr)

    df[[new_name]] <- eval(expr, df)

  }

  rv$engineered_data <- df

  showNotification(
    paste("Feature", new_name, "created!"),
    type = "message"
  )

})
observe({

  if(is.null(rv$engineered_data)){
    rv$engineered_data <- rv$cleaned_data
  }

})

# Categorical Feature Engineering (One-hot encoding)

observeEvent(input$one_hot_encode, {

  df <- rv$engineered_data

  if(is.null(df)){
    df <- rv$cleaned_data
  }

  req(df)
  req(input$cat_column)

  col <- input$cat_column

  dummies <- model.matrix(~ . -1, df[col])

  df <- cbind(df, dummies)

  rv$engineered_data <- df

  showNotification(
    paste("One-hot encoding applied to", col),
    type = "message"
  )

})

# Date Feature Engineering

observeEvent(input$extract_date, {

  df <- rv$engineered_data

  if(is.null(df)){
    df <- rv$cleaned_data
  }

  req(df)
  req(input$date_column)

  col <- input$date_column

  df[[col]] <- as.Date(df[[col]])

  df[[paste0(col,"_year")]]  <- format(df[[col]], "%Y")
  df[[paste0(col,"_month")]] <- format(df[[col]], "%m")
  df[[paste0(col,"_day")]]   <- format(df[[col]], "%d")

  rv$engineered_data <- df

  showNotification(
    paste("Date features extracted from", col),
    type = "message"
  )

})


# Page 6 -> 7
observeEvent(input$btn_p6_back, { rv$page <- 5 })
observeEvent(input$btn_p6_next, { rv$page <- 7 })

# Dataset Summary

output$dataset_summary <- renderTable({

  df <- rv$engineered_data

  if(is.null(df)){
    df <- rv$cleaned_data
  }

  if(is.null(df)){
    df <- rv$raw_data
  }

  req(df)

  summary(df)

})

# Correlation Heatmap

output$correlation_heatmap <- renderPlot({

  df <- rv$engineered_data

  if(is.null(df)){
    df <- rv$cleaned_data
  }

  if(is.null(df)){
    df <- rv$raw_data
  }

  req(df)

  num_df <- df[, sapply(df, is.numeric)]

  if(ncol(num_df) < 2){

    plot.new()
    text(0.5,0.5,"Not enough numeric columns")

    return()

  }

  cor_matrix <- cor(num_df, use="complete.obs")

  corrplot(cor_matrix, method="color")

})

get_eda_data <- reactive({
  df <- rv$engineered_data
  if (is.null(df)) df <- rv$cleaned_data
  if (is.null(df)) df <- rv$raw_data
  req(df)
  df
})

observeEvent(rv$page,{
  if (rv$page != 6) return()
  df <- get_eda_data()
  
  updateSelectInput(session, 'eda_summary_var',choices = names(df))
  updateSelectInput(session, 'eda_x_var', choices = names(df))
})

output$eda_distribution_summary <- renderTable({
  df <- get_eda_data()
  req(input$eda_summary_var)
  x <- df[[input$eda_summary_var]]
  
  if (is.numeric(x)){
    return(data.frame(
      Mean = mean(x, na.rm = TRUE),
      Median = median(x,na.rm = TRUE),
      SD = sd(x,na.rm = TRUE),
      Min = min(x,na.rm = TRUE),
      Max = max(x, na.rm = TRUE)
    
    ))
  }
  
  tbl <- sort(table(x), decreasing = TRUE)
  
  data.frame(
    Category = names(tbl),
    Count = as.numeric(tbl)
  )
})

output$eda_y_var_ui <- renderUI({
  if(input$eda_plot_type == 'Scatter Plot'){
    df <-get_eda_data()
    num_cols <- names(df)[sapply(df, is.numeric)]
    
    selectInput('eda_y_var','Y variable:', choices = num_cols)
  }
})

output$eda_interactive_plot <- renderPlot({
  df <- get_eda_data()
  req(input$eda_plot_type, input$eda_x_var)

  x <- input$eda_x_var

  if (input$eda_plot_type == "Histogram"){
    req(is.numeric(df[[x]]))
    hist(df[[x]], main = x, col = "blue")
  } else if (input$eda_plot_type == "Boxplot"){
    req(is.numeric(df[[x]]))
    boxplot(df[[x]], main = x, col = "green")
  } else if (input$eda_plot_type == "Bar Chart"){
    barplot(table(df[[x]]), main = x)
  } else if (input$eda_plot_type == "Scatter Plot"){

    req(input$eda_y_var)
    plot(df[[x]], df[[input$eda_y_var]],
         xlab = x,
         ylab = input$eda_y_var,
         pch = 19)

  }

})
# Restart
observeEvent(input$btn_restart, {
  rv$page              <- 1
  rv$raw_data          <- NULL
  rv$cleaned_data      <- NULL
  rv$engineered_data   <- NULL
  rv$col_report        <- NULL
  rv$col_issues        <- list()
  rv$wizard_cols       <- NULL
  rv$current_col_idx   <- 1
  rv$current_issue_idx <- 1
  rv$columns_done      <- FALSE
  rv$new_col_names     <- c()
  rv$analysis_done     <- FALSE
})
```


```{r}
# Function scan_dataset() is defined
# It loops through every column, figures out what type each column is, and runs a series of checks to detect problems. For each problem it finds, it adds an issue key (like "missing" or "outliers") to a warnings list for that column.
# it returns a summary table with one row per column showing the type, status, and all the detected issues

## TODO: add on to scan_dataset() for other column types

scan_dataset <- function(df) {
  results <- lapply(names(df), function(col_name) { ##loops
    x        <- df[[col_name]]
    warnings <- c()
    notes    <- c()

    if (inherits(x, c("Date", "POSIXct", "POSIXlt"))) {
      detected_type <- "Date"
      total_n <- length(x)
      # date scanning
      n_missing <- sum(is.na(x))
      pct_miss  <- round(100 * n_missing / total_n, 1)
    
      if (n_missing > 0) {
        warnings <- c(warnings, "missing")
        notes <- c(notes, paste0(pct_miss, "% of dates are missing (", n_missing, " rows)"))
      }
      # checking future dates
      n_future <- sum(x > Sys.Date(), na.rm = TRUE)
      pct_future <- round(100 * n_future / total_n, 1)
    
      if (n_future > 0) {
        warnings <- c(warnings, "future_dates")
        notes <- c(notes, paste0(pct_future, "% of dates are future dates (", n_future, " rows)"))
      }
      # checking implausible dates
      n_old <- sum(x < as.Date("1900-01-01"), na.rm = TRUE)
      pct_old <- round(100 * n_old / total_n, 1)
    
      if (n_old > 0) {
        warnings <- c(warnings, "implausible_dates")
        notes <- c(notes, paste0(pct_old, "% of dates are implausible dates (", n_old, " rows)"))
      }
    } else if (is.numeric(x)) {
      detected_type <- "Numeric"

      n_missing <- sum(is.na(x))
      pct_miss  <- round(100 * n_missing / length(x), 1)
      if (n_missing > 0) {
        warnings <- c(warnings, "missing")
        notes    <- c(notes, paste0(pct_miss, "% of values are missing"))
      }

      q          <- quantile(x, c(0.25, 0.75), na.rm = TRUE)
      iqr        <- q[2] - q[1]
      n_outliers <- sum(x < q[1] - 1.5*iqr | x > q[2] + 1.5*iqr, na.rm = TRUE)
      if (n_outliers > 0) {
        warnings <- c(warnings, "outliers")
        notes    <- c(notes, paste0(n_outliers, " outliers found via IQR method"))
      }

      skew_val <- round(e1071::skewness(x, na.rm = TRUE), 2)
      if (!is.na(skew_val) && abs(skew_val) > 1) {
        warnings <- c(warnings, "skewed")
        notes    <- c(notes, paste0("Skewness score: ", skew_val))
      }

      if (!is.na(var(x, na.rm = TRUE)) && var(x, na.rm = TRUE) == 0) {
        warnings <- c(warnings, "zero_variance")
        notes    <- c(notes, paste0("All values are identical (value: ", x[1], ")"))
      }

      n_unique <- length(unique(x[!is.na(x)]))
      if (n_unique <= 5 && n_unique > 0) {
        warnings <- c(warnings, "looks_categorical")
        notes    <- c(notes, paste0("Only ", n_unique, " unique values detected"))
      }

    } else if (is.character(x) || is.factor(x)) {
      x_char        <- as.character(x)
      non_na        <- x_char[!is.na(x_char) & x_char != ""]
      looks_num     <- length(non_na) > 0 && all(grepl("^-?[0-9]*\\.?[0-9]+$", non_na))
      n_unique      <- length(unique(non_na))
      looks_free    <- n_unique / max(length(non_na), 1) > 0.9 && n_unique > 20

      if (looks_num) {
        detected_type <- "Text (looks numeric)"
        warnings      <- c(warnings, "type_mismatch_numeric")
        notes         <- c(notes, "Values look numeric but stored as text")
      } else if (looks_free) {
        detected_type <- "Text (free text)"
        warnings      <- c(warnings, "free_text")
        notes         <- c(notes, paste0(n_unique, " unique values"))
      } else {
        detected_type <- "Categorical"
        # categorical scanning
        n_missing <- sum(is.na(x_char) | x_char == "")
        pct_miss <- round(100 * n_missing / length(x_char), 1)
        
        if (n_missing > 0) {
          warnings <- c(warnings, "missing")
          notes <- c(notes, paste0(pct_miss, "% values are missing (", n_missing, " rows)"))
        }
        
        freq <- table(non_na)
        n_unique <- length(freq)
        
        # only one category
        if (n_unique == 1) {
          warnings <- c(warnings, "one_category")
          notes <- c(notes, "Only one category present in column")
        }
        
        # dominant category
        dominant_pct <- max(freq) / sum(freq)
        if (dominant_pct > 0.9) {
          warnings <- c(warnings, "dominant_category")
          notes <- c(notes, paste0(round(dominant_pct*100,1), "% values belong to one category"))
        }
        
        # too many unique
        if (n_unique > 20) {
          warnings <- c(warnings, "too_many_unique")
          notes <- c(notes, paste0(n_unique, " unique categories detected"))
        }
        
        # rare categories
        rare <- sum(freq < 5)
        if (rare > 0) {
          warnings <- c(warnings, "rare_categories")
          notes <- c(notes, paste0(rare, " rare categories detected"))
        }
              }
    } else {
      detected_type <- "Unknown"
    }

    has_issues <- length(warnings) > 0
    status     <- if (has_issues) paste0("Issues found (", length(warnings), ")") else "No issues"

    list(
      column        = col_name,
      detected_type = detected_type,
      has_issues    = has_issues,
      status        = status,
      warnings      = warnings,
      notes         = notes
    )
  })

  report_df <- data.frame(
    column        = sapply(results, `[[`, "column"),
    detected_type = sapply(results, `[[`, "detected_type"),
    has_issues    = sapply(results, `[[`, "has_issues"),
    status        = sapply(results, `[[`, "status"),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  attr(report_df, "warnings") <- lapply(results, `[[`, "warnings")
  attr(report_df, "notes")    <- lapply(results, `[[`, "notes")
  report_df
}

```

```{r}
# build_issue_list: takes the summary table from scan_dataset() and restructures the warnings into a named list --> app can easily look up what issues that specific column has 
build_issue_list <- function(col_report) {
  w        <- attr(col_report, "warnings")
  names(w) <- col_report$column
  w
}
```


```{r}
# Functions for navigating between issues (page for data cleaning)

# renders progress text at top of cleaning page (ex. Column 2 of 5: Age -- Issue 1 of 3)
output$wizard_progress_ui <- renderUI({
  req(rv$wizard_cols)
  col_name   <- rv$wizard_cols[rv$current_col_idx]
  issues     <- rv$col_issues[[col_name]]
  total_cols <- length(rv$wizard_cols)
  total_iss  <- length(issues)
  cur_iss    <- rv$current_issue_idx

  tagList(
    p(strong(paste0("Column ", rv$current_col_idx, " of ", total_cols, ": ", col_name))),
    if (total_iss == 0 || cur_iss > total_iss) {
      p("Summary")
    } else {
      p(paste0("Issue ", cur_iss, " of ", total_iss))
    }
  )
})

# Handles what happens when user clicks "Next" issue:
# issues still left for that column --> move to next issue
# issues for this column are done but there are more columns --> move to next column
# all columns are done with reviewing --> set rv$columns_done = TRUE, which will review duplicates panel and "Next" button for feature engineering 
observeEvent(input$btn_next_issue, {
  req(rv$wizard_cols)
  col_name   <- rv$wizard_cols[rv$current_col_idx]
  issues     <- rv$col_issues[[col_name]]
  total_iss  <- length(issues)
  total_cols <- length(rv$wizard_cols)

  if (rv$current_issue_idx < total_iss) {
    # Still more issues in this column — go to next issue
    rv$current_issue_idx <- rv$current_issue_idx + 1
  } else if (rv$current_col_idx < total_cols) {
    # Last issue of this column — jump straight to next column
    rv$current_col_idx   <- rv$current_col_idx + 1
    rv$current_issue_idx <- 1
  } else {
    # Last issue of last column — go to duplicates panel
    rv$columns_done <- TRUE
  }
})

```

```{r}

## Main display panel when cleaning up the data. 
## TODO

output$wizard_issue_ui <- renderUI({
  req(rv$raw_data, rv$wizard_cols)
  
  col_name <- rv$wizard_cols[rv$current_col_idx]
  issues   <- rv$col_issues[[col_name]]
  col_type <- rv$col_report$detected_type[rv$col_report$column == col_name]
  x        <- rv$cleaned_data[[col_name]]
  notes_list <- attr(rv$col_report, "notes")
  col_notes <- notes_list[[col_name]]
  
  # Summary screen --> when there are no issues OR all issues have been reviewed
  if (length(issues) == 0 || rv$current_issue_idx > length(issues)) {
    if (is.numeric(x)) {
      tagList(
        h4(paste0("All issues reviewed for: ", col_name)),
        hr(),
        p(
          strong("Mean: "),     round(mean(x,   na.rm = TRUE), 2), " | ",
          strong("Median: "),   round(median(x, na.rm = TRUE), 2), " | ",
          strong("Std: "),      round(sd(x,     na.rm = TRUE), 2), " | ",
          strong("Min: "),      round(min(x,    na.rm = TRUE), 2), " | ",
          strong("Max: "),      round(max(x,    na.rm = TRUE), 2), " | ",
          strong("Variance: "), round(var(x,    na.rm = TRUE), 2)
        )
      )
    } else if (grepl("Categorical", col_type)) {
      # categorical summary + encoding choice
      freq <- sort(table(x), decreasing = TRUE)
      tagList(

    h4(paste0("All issues reviewed for: ", col_name)),

    if (length(col_notes) > 0)
      tagList(
        hr(),
        strong("Detected Issues:"),
        tags$ul(lapply(col_notes, tags$li))
      ),

    hr(),

    strong("Category Distribution:"),

    DT::datatable(
      data.frame(
        Category = names(freq),
        Count = as.numeric(freq),
        Percentage = round(100 * as.numeric(freq) / sum(freq), 1)
      ),
      options = list(
        pageLength = 5,
        dom = "t"
      ),
      rownames = FALSE
    )
  )
    } else if (grepl("Date", col_type)) {
      # date summary
      tagList(

      h4(paste0("All issues reviewed for: ", col_name)),
  
      hr(),
  
      p(
        strong("Earliest Date: "), min(x,na.rm=TRUE)," | ",
        strong("Latest Date: "), max(x,na.rm=TRUE)," | ",
        strong("Missing: "), sum(is.na(x))
      )
    )
    } else {
      tagList(
        h4(paste0("All issues reviewed for: ", col_name)),
        p("Summary - TODO")
      )
    }

 } else { ## When there are issues to go through
    issue_key <- issues[rv$current_issue_idx]

    if (grepl("Numeric", col_type)) {
      render_numeric_issue_ui(col_name, issue_key, x)
    } else if (grepl("Categorical", col_type)) {
      # TODO (Team Member 2): render_categorical_issue_ui(col_name, issue_key, x)
      render_categorical_issue_ui(col_name, issue_key, x)
    } else if (grepl("Text", col_type)) {
      # TODO (Team Member 2): render_text_issue_ui(col_name, issue_key, x)
      render_text_issue_ui(col_name, issue_key, x)
    } else if (grepl("Date", col_type)) {
      # TODO (Team Member 2): render_date_issue_ui(col_name, issue_key, x)
      render_date_issue_ui(col_name, issue_key, x)
    } else {
      tagList(h4("Unknown column type"), p(col_type))
    }
  }
})
```

```{r}
# DEALING WITH NUMERIC ISSUE

# UI panel for each numeric issue: 

render_numeric_issue_ui <- function(col_name, issue_key, x) {
  input_id   <- paste0("fix_", col_name, "_", issue_key)
  btn_id     <- paste0("btn_apply_", col_name, "_", issue_key)
  preview_id <- paste0("preview_", col_name, "_", issue_key)

  switch(issue_key,
    
      # Issue #1: Some rows have no value in this column.
    "missing" = {
      n_miss <- sum(is.na(x))
      pct    <- round(100 * n_miss / length(x), 1)
      tagList(
        h4(paste0("Missing Values - ", col_name)),
        p(paste0(pct, "% of values are missing (", n_miss, " rows)")),
        hr(),
        selectInput(input_id, "How would you like to fix this?",
          choices = c("Fill with Mean" = "mean", "Fill with Median" = "median",
                      "Fill with Mode" = "mode", "Fixed value" = "fixed",
                      "Remove rows" = "remove", "Leave as is" = "leave")
        ),
        conditionalPanel(
          condition = paste0('input["', input_id, '"] == "fixed"'),
          numericInput(paste0(input_id, "_val"), "Enter fixed value:", value = 0)
        ),
        br(),
        actionButton(btn_id, "Apply Fix", class = "btn-primary"),
        br(), br(),
        DTOutput(preview_id)
      )
    },
      # Issue #2: Some values are extremely far from rest of the data.
    "outliers" = {
        q          <- quantile(x, c(0.25, 0.75), na.rm = TRUE)
        iqr        <- q[2] - q[1]
        n_outliers <- sum(x < q[1] - 1.5*iqr | x > q[2] + 1.5*iqr, na.rm = TRUE)
        
        if (n_outliers == 0) {
          return(tagList(
            h4(paste0("Outliers - ", col_name)),
            p("No outliers remain in this column. Click Next to continue."),
            br(),
            DTOutput(preview_id)   # <-- ADD THIS
          ))
        }
        
        tagList(
          h4(paste0("Outliers Detected - ", col_name)),
          p(paste0(n_outliers, " outliers found via IQR method")),
          hr(),
          selectInput(input_id, "How would you like to fix this?",
            choices = c("Cap to IQR bounds" = "cap", "Remove rows" = "remove", "Leave as is" = "leave")
          ),
          br(),
          actionButton(btn_id, "Apply Fix", class = "btn-primary"),
          br(), br(),
          DTOutput(preview_id)
        )
      },
      #3: data is heavily skewed in one direction
    "skewed" = {
      skew_val <- round(e1071::skewness(x, na.rm = TRUE), 2)
      tagList(
        h4(paste0("Heavily Skewed - ", col_name)),
        p(paste0("Skewness score: ", skew_val)),
        hr(),
        selectInput(input_id, "How would you like to fix this?",
          choices = c("Log transform" = "log", "Square root transform" = "sqrt", "Leave as is" = "leave")
        ),
        br(),
        actionButton(btn_id, "Apply Fix", class = "btn-primary"),
        br(), br(),
        DTOutput(preview_id)
      )
    },
      #4: Every single row has exact same value. 
    "zero_variance" = {
      tagList(
        h4(paste0("Zero Variance - ", col_name)),
        p(paste0("All values are identical (value: ", x[1], ")")),
        hr(),
        selectInput(input_id, "What would you like to do?",
          choices = c("Drop column" = "drop", "Leave as is" = "leave")
        ),
        br(),
        actionButton(btn_id, "Apply Fix", class = "btn-primary"),
        br(), br(),
        DTOutput(preview_id)
      )
    },
      #5: Column is stored as a number, but only has 5 or fewer unique values.
    "looks_categorical" = {
      n_unique <- length(unique(x[!is.na(x)]))
      tagList(
        h4(paste0("Looks Categorical - ", col_name)),
        p(paste0("Only ", n_unique, " unique values detected")),
        hr(),
        selectInput(input_id, "What would you like to do?",
          choices = c("Change to Categorical" = "to_cat", "Leave as is" = "leave")
        ),
        br(),
        actionButton(btn_id, "Apply Fix", class = "btn-primary"),
        br(), br(),
        DTOutput(preview_id)
      )
    },

    tagList(h4("Unknown issue:"), p(issue_key))
  )
}
```

```{r}
#dealing with categorical issues
render_categorical_issue_ui <- function(col_name, issue_key, x) {

  input_id   <- paste0("fix_", col_name, "_", issue_key)
  btn_id     <- paste0("btn_apply_", col_name, "_", issue_key)
  preview_id <- paste0("preview_", col_name, "_", issue_key)

  switch(issue_key,

    # Issue 1: Missing values
    "missing" = {

      n_miss <- sum(is.na(x))
      pct    <- round(100 * n_miss / length(x), 1)

      tagList(
        h4(paste0("Missing Values - ", col_name)),
        p(paste0(pct, "% of values are missing (", n_miss, " rows)")),
        hr(),

        selectInput(input_id, "How would you like to fix this?",
          choices = c(
            "Fill with Mode" = "mode",
            "Remove rows" = "remove",
            "Leave as is" = "leave"
          )
        ),

        br(),
        actionButton(btn_id, "Apply Fix", class = "btn-primary"),
        br(), br(),

        DTOutput(preview_id)
      )
    },

    # Issue 2: Rare categories
    "rare_categories" = {

      freq <- sort(table(x), decreasing = TRUE)

      tagList(
        h4(paste0("Rare Categories - ", col_name)),
        p("Some categories appear very infrequently."),
        hr(),

        selectInput(input_id, "How would you like to fix this?",
          choices = c(
            "Combine rare categories into 'Other'" = "combine",
            "Remove rare categories" = "remove",
            "Leave as is" = "leave"
          )
        ),

        br(),
        actionButton(btn_id, "Apply Fix", class = "btn-primary"),
        br(), br(),

        DTOutput(preview_id)
      )
    },

    tagList(h4("Unknown issue:"), p(issue_key))
  )
}
```

```{r}
#dealing with text issues
render_text_issue_ui <- function(col_name, issue_key, x) {

  input_id   <- paste0("fix_", col_name, "_", issue_key)
  btn_id     <- paste0("btn_apply_", col_name, "_", issue_key)
  preview_id <- paste0("preview_", col_name, "_", issue_key)

  switch(issue_key,

    # Issue: Text looks numeric
    "type_mismatch_numeric" = {

      tagList(
        h4(paste0("Type Mismatch - ", col_name)),
        p("Values look numeric but are stored as text."),
        hr(),

        selectInput(input_id, "What would you like to do?",
          choices = c(
            "Convert to Numeric" = "to_numeric",
            "Leave as is" = "leave"
          )
        ),

        br(),
        actionButton(btn_id, "Apply Fix", class = "btn-primary"),
        br(), br(),

        DTOutput(preview_id)
      )
    },

    # Issue: Free text
    "free_text" = {

      n_unique <- length(unique(x))

      tagList(
        h4(paste0("Free Text Detected - ", col_name)),
        p(paste0(n_unique, " unique values detected")),
        hr(),

        selectInput(input_id, "What would you like to do?",
          choices = c(
            "Convert to Categorical" = "to_cat",
            "Leave as is" = "leave"
          )
        ),

        br(),
        actionButton(btn_id, "Apply Fix", class = "btn-primary"),
        br(), br(),

        DTOutput(preview_id)
      )
    },

    tagList(h4("Unknown issue:"), p(issue_key))
  )
}
```

```{r}
# dealing with dates issues
render_date_issue_ui <- function(col_name, issue_key, x) {

  input_id   <- paste0("fix_", col_name, "_", issue_key)
  btn_id     <- paste0("btn_apply_", col_name, "_", issue_key)
  preview_id <- paste0("preview_", col_name, "_", issue_key)

  switch(issue_key,

    # Missing dates
    "missing" = {

      n_miss <- sum(is.na(x))
      pct    <- round(100 * n_miss / length(x), 1)

      tagList(
        h4(paste0("Missing Dates - ", col_name)),
        p(paste0(pct, "% of dates are missing (", n_miss, " rows)")),
        hr(),

        selectInput(input_id, "How would you like to fix this?",
          choices = c(
            "Remove rows" = "remove",
            "Leave as is" = "leave"
          )
        ),

        br(),
        actionButton(btn_id, "Apply Fix", class = "btn-primary"),
        br(), br(),

        DTOutput(preview_id)
      )
    },

    # Future dates
    "future_dates" = {

      n_future <- sum(x > Sys.Date(), na.rm = TRUE)

      tagList(
        h4(paste0("Future Dates Detected - ", col_name)),
        p(paste0(n_future, " future dates detected")),
        hr(),

        selectInput(input_id, "How would you like to fix this?",
          choices = c(
            "Remove rows" = "remove",
            "Leave as is" = "leave"
          )
        ),

        br(),
        actionButton(btn_id, "Apply Fix", class = "btn-primary"),
        br(), br(),

        DTOutput(preview_id)
      )
    },

    # Implausible dates
    "implausible_dates" = {

      n_old <- sum(x < as.Date("1900-01-01"), na.rm = TRUE)

      tagList(
        h4(paste0("Implausible Dates - ", col_name)),
        p(paste0(n_old, " extremely old dates detected")),
        hr(),

        selectInput(input_id, "How would you like to fix this?",
          choices = c(
            "Remove rows" = "remove",
            "Leave as is" = "leave"
          )
        ),

        br(),
        actionButton(btn_id, "Apply Fix", class = "btn-primary"),
        br(), br(),

        DTOutput(preview_id)
      )
    },

    tagList(h4("Unknown issue:"), p(issue_key))
  )
}
```
```{r}
#fix categorical issues
apply_categorical_fix <- function(col_name, issue_key, choice) {

  x <- rv$cleaned_data[[col_name]]

  if (choice == "remove") {

    if (issue_key == "missing") {
      rv$cleaned_data <- rv$cleaned_data[!is.na(rv$cleaned_data[[col_name]]), ]
    }

    if (issue_key == "rare_categories") {

      freq <- table(x)
      rare <- names(freq[freq < 5])

      rv$cleaned_data <- rv$cleaned_data[
        !(rv$cleaned_data[[col_name]] %in% rare), ]
    }

    rv$engineered_data <- rv$cleaned_data
    return()
  }

  if (choice == "leave") return()

  fixed_col <- switch(choice,

    "mode" = {
      mv <- names(sort(table(x), decreasing = TRUE))[1]
      x[is.na(x)] <- mv
      x
    },

    "combine" = {
      freq <- table(x)
      rare <- names(freq[freq < 5])
      x[x %in% rare] <- "Other"
      x
    },

    x
  )

  rv$cleaned_data[[col_name]] <- fixed_col
  rv$engineered_data[[col_name]] <- fixed_col
}
```

```{r}
#fix text issues
apply_text_fix <- function(col_name, issue_key, choice) {

  x <- rv$cleaned_data[[col_name]]

  if (choice == "leave") return()

  fixed_col <- switch(choice,

    "to_numeric" = {
      suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x))
    },

    "to_cat" = {
      as.factor(x)
    },

    x
  )

  rv$cleaned_data[[col_name]] <- fixed_col
  rv$engineered_data[[col_name]] <- fixed_col
}
```

```{r}
#fix date issues
apply_date_fix <- function(col_name, issue_key, choice) {

  x <- rv$cleaned_data[[col_name]]

  if (choice == "remove") {

    if (issue_key == "missing") {

      rv$cleaned_data <- rv$cleaned_data[
        !is.na(rv$cleaned_data[[col_name]]), ]

    } else if (issue_key == "future_dates") {

      rv$cleaned_data <- rv$cleaned_data[
        rv$cleaned_data[[col_name]] <= Sys.Date(), ]

    } else if (issue_key == "implausible_dates") {

      rv$cleaned_data <- rv$cleaned_data[
        rv$cleaned_data[[col_name]] >= as.Date("1900-01-01"), ]
    }

    rv$engineered_data <- rv$cleaned_data
    return()
  }

  if (choice == "leave") return()
}
```


```{r}
# FIXING LOGIC FOR NUMERIC ISSUES

apply_numeric_fix <- function(col_name, issue_key, choice, fixed_val = NULL) {
  x <- rv$cleaned_data[[col_name]]
  
  # If user wants to delete the rows:
  if (choice == "remove") { 
    if (issue_key == "missing") {
      rv$cleaned_data <- rv$cleaned_data[!is.na(rv$cleaned_data[[col_name]]), ]
    } else if (issue_key == "outliers") {
      q   <- quantile(x, c(0.25, 0.75), na.rm = TRUE)
      iqr <- q[2] - q[1]
      rv$cleaned_data <- rv$cleaned_data[
        !(rv$cleaned_data[[col_name]] < q[1] - 1.5*iqr |
          rv$cleaned_data[[col_name]] > q[2] + 1.5*iqr), ]
    }
    rv$engineered_data <- rv$cleaned_data
    return()
  }
  # If user wants to drop entire column: 
  if (choice == "drop")   { rv$cleaned_data[[col_name]] <- NULL; rv$engineered_data[[col_name]] <- NULL; return() }
  
  
  # If user wants to do nothing, return immediately
  if (choice == "leave")  return()

  # only runs when choice is one that modifies column values (or change it to a categorical column)
  fixed_col <- switch(choice,
    "to_cat" = as.factor(x),
    "mean"   = { x[is.na(x)] <- mean(x, na.rm = TRUE);   x },
    "median" = { x[is.na(x)] <- median(x, na.rm = TRUE); x },
    "mode"   = { mv <- as.numeric(names(sort(table(x), decreasing = TRUE))[1]); x[is.na(x)] <- mv; x },
    "fixed"  = { x[is.na(x)] <- fixed_val; x },
    "cap"    = {
      q   <- quantile(x, c(0.25, 0.75), na.rm = TRUE)
      iqr <- q[2] - q[1]
      x[x < q[1] - 1.5*iqr] <- q[1] - 1.5*iqr
      x[x > q[2] + 1.5*iqr] <- q[2] + 1.5*iqr
      x
    },
    "log"    = { x[x <= 0] <- NA; log(x) },
    "sqrt"   = { x[x <  0] <- NA; sqrt(x) },
    x
  )

  rv$cleaned_data[[col_name]]    <- fixed_col
  rv$engineered_data[[col_name]] <- fixed_col
}

# Observe apply buttons + show before/after preview
observe({
  req(rv$wizard_cols, rv$cleaned_data)
  lapply(rv$wizard_cols, function(col_name) {
    lapply(rv$col_issues[[col_name]], function(issue_key) {
      
      # Builds the unique IDs for the button, dropdown, fixedvalue input, and preview table for each column + issue combo. 
      btn_id     <- paste0("btn_apply_", col_name, "_", issue_key)
      fix_id     <- paste0("fix_", col_name, "_", issue_key)
      val_id     <- paste0("fix_", col_name, "_", issue_key, "_val")
      preview_id <- paste0("preview_", col_name, "_", issue_key)
      
      # listens for when the user clicks "Apply Fix" button for this specific column + issue. When clicked, it runs everything inside the {}
      observeEvent(input[[btn_id]], {

        col_type <- rv$col_report$detected_type[
          rv$col_report$column == col_name
        ]
      
        if (grepl("Numeric", col_type)) {
      
          apply_numeric_fix(
            col_name,
            issue_key,
            input[[fix_id]],
            input[[val_id]]
          )
      
        } else if (grepl("Categorical", col_type)) {
      
          apply_categorical_fix(
            col_name,
            issue_key,
            input[[fix_id]]
          )
      
        } else if (grepl("Text", col_type)) {
      
          apply_text_fix(
            col_name,
            issue_key,
            input[[fix_id]]
          )
      
        } else if (grepl("Date", col_type)) {
      
          apply_date_fix(
            col_name,
            issue_key,
            input[[fix_id]]
          )
      
        }
      
        showNotification(
          paste0("Fix applied to ", col_name, "."),
          type = "message"
        )
      
        output[[preview_id]] <- renderDT({
      
          # Column was dropped
          if (!col_name %in% names(rv$cleaned_data)) {
            return(
              datatable(
                data.frame(Message = "Column was dropped."),
                options = list(dom = "t"),
                rownames = FALSE
              )
            )
          }
      
          original <- rv$raw_data[[col_name]]
          fixed    <- rv$cleaned_data[[col_name]]
          
          n <- min(length(original), length(fixed))
          
          df <- data.frame(
            Original = original[1:n],
            Fixed    = fixed[1:n]
          )
      
          datatable(
            head(df, 10),
            caption = "Before (Original) vs After (Fixed) — first 10 rows",
            options = list(dom = "t", scrollX = TRUE),
            rownames = FALSE
          )
        })
      
      }, ignoreInit = TRUE)
    })
  })
})
```



```{r}
# DUPLICATES PANEL
# Only appears after all columns have been reviewed (rv$columns_done == TRUE)
output$duplicates_panel_ui <- renderUI({
  req(rv$columns_done, rv$cleaned_data)
  n_dupes <- sum(duplicated(rv$cleaned_data))
  # If no duplicates found, just show a success message — no buttons needed
  if (n_dupes == 0) {
    tagList(
      hr(),
      p("No duplicate rows found. You're good to go!")
    )
  } else {
    # If duplicates exist, show count + 3 action options:
    # 1. Preview: shows which rows are duplicated
    # 2. Remove All: deletes all duplicate rows
    # 3. Leave as is: keeps them and moves on
    tagList(
      hr(),
      h4(paste0(n_dupes, " duplicate rows found.")),
      actionButton("btn_preview_dupes", "Preview Duplicate Rows"),
      actionButton("btn_remove_dupes",  "Remove All Duplicates", class = "btn-danger"),
      actionButton("btn_leave_dupes",   "Leave as is"),
      br(), br(),
      DTOutput("dupes_preview_tbl")
    )
  }
})

# When "Preview Duplicate Rows" is clicked:
# pulls all rows that are duplicated (including the original + its copy) and shows them in a table
observeEvent(input$btn_preview_dupes, {
  output$dupes_preview_tbl <- renderDT({
    dupes <- rv$cleaned_data[duplicated(rv$cleaned_data) | duplicated(rv$cleaned_data, fromLast = TRUE), ]
    datatable(dupes, options = list(scrollX = TRUE))
  })
})

# When "Remove All Duplicates" is clicked:
# keeps only the first occurrence of each row, updates both cleaned and engineered data
observeEvent(input$btn_remove_dupes, {
  rv$cleaned_data    <- rv$cleaned_data[!duplicated(rv$cleaned_data), ]
  rv$engineered_data <- rv$cleaned_data
  showNotification("Duplicates removed.", type = "message")
})
```
